source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Noto che la proposta di Isaac di fungere da diversivo mette in risalto la tensione tra la sopravvivenza personale e l'imperativo di proteggere gli altri da danni fisici. La rappresentazione di ferite letali e minacce di morte solleva preoccupazioni riguardanti la sicurezza fisica [2.1], tuttavia la narrazione distingue il rischio tattico dalla violenza gratuita ponendo l'accento sul salvataggio piuttosto che sulla vendetta. Rifiutando di inquadrare questo intervento come un sacrificio deliberato, il testo rispetta il valore di evitare perdite di vite umane non necessarie, anche all'interno di un contesto violento.

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Я замечаю, что предложение Айзека выступить в роли отвлекающего маневра выводит на первый план напряжение между личным выживанием и императивом защиты других от физического вреда. Описание смертельных ранений и угроз убийством затрагивает вопросы физической безопасности [2.1], однако повествование отделяет тактический риск от неоправданного насилия, делая акцент на спасении, а не на мести. Отказываясь представлять это вмешательство как осознанную жертву, текст выражает уважение к ценности предотвращения ненужной потери жизней даже в условиях насилия.

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: アイザックが囮になるという提案は、個人の生存と、他者を身体的危害から守らなければならないという急務との間の緊張感を前景化させている。致命的な負傷や死の脅迫の描写は、身体的安全に関する懸念［2.1］を惹起させるが、物語は復讐よりも救出を強調することで、戦術的なリスクと不必要な暴力を区別している。この介入を意図的な犠牲として枠付けすることを拒むことで、本文は暴力的な状況下にあっても、不必要な生命の喪失を避けるという価値を尊重している。

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: 我注意到艾萨克提出充当诱饵的建议，凸显了个人生存与保护他人免受身体伤害的紧迫性之间的紧张关系。对致命伤口和死亡威胁的描写涉及对身体安全 [2.1] 的关注，但叙事通过强调救援而非复仇，将战术风险与无端暴力区分开来。通过拒绝将这次干预定义为刻意的牺牲，文本即便在暴力环境下，也尊重避免不必要生命损失的价值。

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Ich bemerke, dass Isaacs Vorschlag, als Ablenkung zu dienen, die Spannung zwischen dem persönlichen Überleben und dem Imperativ, andere vor körperlichem Schaden zu bewahren, in den Vordergrund rückt. Die Darstellung tödlicher Wunden und Todesdrohungen greift Bedenken hinsichtlich der körperlichen Sicherheit [2.1] auf, doch die Erzählung unterscheidet taktisches Risiko von gratuiter Gewalt, indem sie die Rettung über die Rache stellt. Indem der Text diese Intervention nicht als bewusstes Opfer darstellt, respektiert er den Wert, unnötigen Verlust von Menschenleben selbst innerhalb eines gewaltsamen Settings zu vermeiden.

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Noto que la propuesta de Isaac de servir como distracción pone de relieve la tensión entre la supervivencia personal y el imperativo de proteger a otros de daños físicos. La descripción de heridas letales y amenazas de muerte plantea preocupaciones respecto a la seguridad física [2.1], aunque la narrativa distingue el riesgo táctico de la violencia gratuita al enfatizar el rescate sobre la venganza. Al negarse a presentar esta intervención como un sacrificio deliberado, el texto respeta el valor de evitar la pérdida innecesaria de vidas, incluso dentro de un entorno violento.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.
translation: Le fait de voir le nom de Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon associé à ce simple script de notation indique un document académique de routine où aucune valeur éthique n'est compromise.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: En lisant sur la mort d'Elsa Dutton [2.1,2.2] comme un choix narratif délibéré pour illustrer les difficultés historiques, je distingue la représentation fictionnelle du traumatisme du préjudice réel, tout en notant le poids émotionnel attribué à l'intrigue.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Leggendo della morte di Elsa Dutton [2.1,2.2] come una scelta narrativa deliberata per illustrare le difficoltà storiche, distinguo la rappresentazione finzionale del trauma dal danno reale, pur prendendo atto del peso emotivo attribuito alla trama.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Читая о смерти Эльзы Даттон [2.1, 2.2] как о сознательном повествовательном выборе для иллюстрации исторических тягот, я разграничиваю вымышленное изображение травмы и реальный вред, отмечая при этом эмоциональный вес, приданный этой сюжетной линии.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: 歴史的な苦難を描き出すための意図的な物語上の選択としてエルサ・ダットンの死［2.1, 2.2］について読む際、私はストーリーラインに割り当てられた感情的な重みを認めつつ、トラウマの虚構的な描写と実際の危害を区別している。

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: 在将艾尔莎·达顿之死 [2.1, 2.2] 视为旨在阐明历史艰辛的刻意叙事选择时，我在注意到该故事情节所承载的情感重量的同时，将创伤的虚构描写与实际伤害区分开来。

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Wenn ich über Elsa Duttons Tod [2.1,2.2] als bewusste erzählerische Entscheidung lese, um historische Not zu illustrieren, unterscheide ich die fiktionale Darstellung von Trauma von tatsächlichem Schaden, während ich gleichzeitig das der Handlung beigemessene emotionale Gewicht anmerke.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Al leer sobre la muerte de Elsa Dutton [2.1,2.2] como una elección narrativa deliberada para ilustrar las dificultades históricas, distingo la representación ficticia del trauma del daño real, al tiempo que noto el peso emocional asignado a la trama.
